name: Time Toolkit
description: Professional Date & Time Workbench — Universal input auto-detects any date, timestamp, timezone, or coordinate and instantly populates 16 intelligent tool groups: basic info, timestamp converter, date formats, calendar, timezones, date arithmetic, date difference, age calculator, astronomy, business days, developer snippets, cron parser, export, productivity, religious calendar, and utilities. 100+ tools in one elegant single-page workbench.
author: Shamrouz Awan
icon: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 24 24' fill='none' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='2' stroke-linecap='round' stroke-linejoin='round'><circle cx='12' cy='12' r='10'/><polyline points='12 6 12 12 16 14'/></svg>

meta.title: Time Toolkit — Professional Date & Time Workbench
meta.description: Universal date & time workbench with 16 tool groups — timestamp conversion, timezone world clock, date arithmetic, age calculator, astronomy, cron parser, Hijri calendar, developer code snippets, and more. 100% client-side.
